name: datahyve

metadata.name: datahyve
metadata.summary: Server metrics in real-time with RAG-powered insights 🚀

documentation:
# DataHyve CLI Client [![YouTube](https://img.shields.io/badge/YouTube-Video-red?logo=youtube)](https://www.youtube.com/link-to-video) [![Devpost](https://img.shields.io/badge/Devpost-Project-blue?logo=devpost)](https://devpost.com/link-to-project) [![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-green)](./LICENSE)
Install the client, send data to a SQL DB, and visualize insights on a Streamlit dashboard. Query your servers for real-time analysis ## Author [Aryan Khurana](https://github.com/AryanK1511)

functions.name: datahyve.main.stream_metrics
documentation: Streams the server metrics to the DataHyve cloud database instance on Snowflake

functions.name: datahyve.main.stop_stream
documentation: Stops the background streaming process.

functions.name: datahyve.main.create_config
documentation: Creates the .datahyve.toml configuration file with placeholders.

functions.name: datahyve.main.remove_config
documentation: Removes the .datahyve.toml configuration file.

modules.name: datahyve.snowflake.queries
documentation: Query used to create the SERVER_METRICS table in the DB

functions.name: datahyve.snowflake.streamer.stream_metrics
documentation: Streams metrics to the database on Snowflake.

functions.name: datahyve.snowflake.connection.connect_to_snowflake
documentation: Connects to Snowflake database instance on the cloud
Ref Doc: https://docs.snowflake.com/en/developer-guide/python-connector/python-connector-connect

functions.name: datahyve.utils.streaming.get_pid
documentation: Reads the process ID from a file.

functions.name: datahyve.utils.streaming.save_pid
documentation: Saves the process ID to a file.

functions.name: datahyve.utils.streaming.run_streaming
documentation: Run the streaming task as an asynchronous subprocess.

functions.name: datahyve.snowflake.helpers.create_table
documentation: Create a table in the snowflake database

functions.name: datahyve.snowflake.helpers.collect_metrics
documentation: Collect server metrics

functions.name: datahyve.snowflake.helpers.insert_metrics
documentation: Insert metrics into Snowflake

functions.name: datahyve.utils.configfiles.create_config_file
documentation: Creates the .datahyve.toml configuration file.

functions.name: datahyve.utils.configfiles.remove_config_file
documentation: Removes the .datahyve.toml configuration file.

functions.name: datahyve.utils.configfiles.check_config_exists
documentation: Check if the config file exists

functions.name: datahyve.utils.configfiles.get_config_file_content
documentation: Reads the configuration file and returns its content as a dictionary.
